You can copy and paste this code directly to start using the function immediately.`}),`
`,(0,a.jsx)(n,{name:"use-validated-state",code:`"use client";\r
import { useState } from "react";\r
\r
export function useValidatedState<T>(initialValue: T, validation: (value: T) => boolean, initialValidationState?: boolean) {\r
  const [value, setValue] = useState<T>(initialValue);\r
  const [lastValidValue, setLastValidValue] = useState<T | undefined>(validation(initialValue) ? initialValue : undefined);\r
  const [valid, setValid] = useState<boolean>(typeof initialValidationState === "boolean" ? initialValidationState : validation(initialValue));\r
\r
  const onChange = (val: T) => {\r
    if (validation(val)) {\r
      setLastValidValue(val);\r
      setValid(true);\r
    } else {\r
      setValid(false);\r
    }\r
\r
    setValue(val);\r
  };\r
\r
  return [{ value, lastValidValue, valid }, onChange] as const;\r
}`,ext:".ts",repo:"web/hooks/use-validated-state.ts"})]})}function u(t={}){let{wrapper:e}=t.components||{};return e?(0,a.jsx)(e,{...t,children:(0,a.jsx)(c,{...t})}):c(t)}function S(t,e){throw new Error("Expected "+(e?"component":"object")+" `"+t+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return w(b);})();
